data.openingParagraph: I am writing to express my interest in the Solar Design Engineer position at GreenTech Solutions. As a recent graduate with specialized training in solar system design and renewable energy applications, I am eager to contribute to your team's mission of advancing sustainable energy solutions.
bodyParagraphs: During my internship as a Solar Intern, I successfully designed and installed multiple solar systems, gaining hands-on experience with PV system sizing and implementation. My technical proficiency in AutoCAD and Python scripting has been directly applied in creating detailed solar layouts and analyzing performance data for electric mobility projects. Additionally, my academic background in Agricultural and Biosystems Engineering has equipped me with a comprehensive understanding of renewable energy systems and their practical applications in real-world scenarios.

I am actively pursuing NABCEP certification to further enhance my qualifications and align with GreenTech Solutions' high standards for solar design engineering. My ability to combine technical expertise with practical implementation makes me a valuable asset for your team's renewable energy projects.
data.closingParagraph: I am confident that my skills in solar design, PV system sizing, and AutoCAD proficiency, combined with my passion for renewable energy, make me an excellent candidate for this position. I welcome the opportunity to discuss how my qualifications align with GreenTech Solutions' objectives and look forward to the possibility of contributing to your innovative projects.
